attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CFN.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
CFN.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_NAME,
CFN.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_DESCRIPTION,
CFN.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
CFN.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
CFN.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
CFN.ACTION_CODE
FROM (
 SELECT 
 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_NAME,
 SMFIFST.DESCRIPTION CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_DESCRIPTION,
 COALESCE(PROJ_LOC.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
 COALESCE(SUBAC_LOC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
 COALESCE(AC_LOC.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
 SMFIFST.ACTION_CODE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_STRUC_TL SMFIFST
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFALTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_ACCT
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFALTV
      ON SMFIFS_ACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFALTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFALTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT4'
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='BE'
    ) AC_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = AC_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = AC_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = AC_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_SUBACCT
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_SUBACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFSLTV
      ON SMFIFS_SUBACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFSLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT5'
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#' 
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='BE'
    ) SUBAC_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = SUBAC_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = SUBAC_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = SUBAC_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_ID,
       SMFIFS_PROJ.ID_FLEX_NUM,
       SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
       SMFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME,
       NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
       FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_PROJ
       INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_PROJ_LOCALITY_TV NFPLTV
       ON SMFIFS_PROJ.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
       AND NFPLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
       AND SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT6'
       AND SMFIFS_PROJ.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
       AND SMFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME ='BE'
    ) PROJ_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = PROJ_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = PROJ_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = PROJ_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 WHERE SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
 AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BE'
 AND SMFIFST.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'US'
 UNION ALL
 SELECT 
 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_NAME,
 SMFIFST.DESCRIPTION CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_DESCRIPTION,
 COALESCE(PROJ_LOC.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
 COALESCE(SUBAC_LOC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
 COALESCE(AC_LOC.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
 SMFIFST.ACTION_CODE
 FROM 
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_STRUC_TL SMFIFST
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFALTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_ACCT
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFALTV
      ON SMFIFS_ACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFALTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFALTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT4'
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='BE'
    ) AC_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = AC_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = AC_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = AC_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_SUBACCT
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_SUBACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFSLTV
      ON SMFIFS_SUBACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFSLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT5'
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='BE'
      ) SUBAC_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = SUBAC_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = SUBAC_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = SUBAC_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_PROJ.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_PROJ
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_PROJ_LOCALITY_TV NFPLTV
      ON SMFIFS_PROJ.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFPLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT6'
      AND SMFIFS_PROJ.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
      AND SMFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME ='BE'
      ) PROJ_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = PROJ_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = PROJ_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = PROJ_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 WHERE SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
 AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BE'
 AND SMFIFST.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'US'
 ) CFN
 Union all
 SELECT 
OUT_SJ.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
OUT_SJ.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_NAME,
OUT_SJ.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_DESCRIPTION,
OUT_SJ.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
OUT_SJ.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
OUT_SJ.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
OUT_SJ.ACTION_CODE
FROM (
 SELECT 
 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_NAME,
 SMFIFST.DESCRIPTION CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_DESCRIPTION,
 COALESCE(PROJ_LOC.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
 COALESCE(SUBAC_LOC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
 COALESCE(AC_LOC.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
 SMFIFST.ACTION_CODE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_STRUC_TL SMFIFST
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME,

      FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_ACCT
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFALTV

      AND NFALTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101

      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='US'
    ) AC_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = AC_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = AC_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = AC_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_SUBACCT
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_SUBACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFSLTV
      ON SMFIFS_SUBACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFSLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT5'
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#' 
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='US'
      ) SUBAC_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = SUBAC_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = SUBAC_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = SUBAC_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_PROJ.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_PROJ
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_PROJ_LOCALITY_TV NFPLTV
      ON SMFIFS_PROJ.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFPLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT6'
      AND SMFIFS_PROJ.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
      AND SMFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME ='US'
      ) PROJ_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = PROJ_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = PROJ_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = PROJ_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 WHERE SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
 AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = 'US'
 AND SMFIFST.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'US'
 UNION ALL
 SELECT 
 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_NAME,
 SMFIFST.DESCRIPTION CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_DESCRIPTION,
 COALESCE(PROJ_LOC.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
 COALESCE(SUBAC_LOC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
 COALESCE(AC_LOC.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
 SMFIFST.ACTION_CODE
 FROM 
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_STRUC_TL SMFIFST
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFALTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_ACCT
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFALTV
      ON SMFIFS_ACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFALTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFALTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT4'
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='US'
      ) AC_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = AC_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = AC_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = AC_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_SUBACCT
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_SUBACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFSLTV
      ON SMFIFS_SUBACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFSLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT5'
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='US'
      ) SUBAC_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = SUBAC_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = SUBAC_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = SUBAC_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_PROJ.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_PROJ
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_PROJ_LOCALITY_TV NFPLTV
      ON SMFIFS_PROJ.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFPLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT6'
      AND SMFIFS_PROJ.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
      AND SMFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME ='US'
      ) PROJ_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = PROJ_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = PROJ_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = PROJ_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 WHERE SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
 AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = 'US'
 AND SMFIFST.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'US'
 ) OUT_SJ
 WHERE (OUT_SJ.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT) NOT IN 
  (SELECT CFN.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT
   FROM (SELECT 
 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_NAME,
 SMFIFST.DESCRIPTION CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_DESCRIPTION,
 COALESCE(PROJ_LOC.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
 COALESCE(SUBAC_LOC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
 COALESCE(AC_LOC.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
 SMFIFST.ACTION_CODE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_STRUC_TL SMFIFST
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFALTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_ACCT
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFALTV
      ON SMFIFS_ACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFALTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFALTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101

      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='BE'

  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = AC_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = AC_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME

      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,

       SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
       SMFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME,

       INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_PROJ_LOCALITY_TV NFPLTV
       ON SMFIFS_PROJ.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
       AND NFPLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101

 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_NAME,

SELECT  /* Added OM flow as part of R9 */
  SOFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
  SOFIFST.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_NAME,
  SOFIFST.DESCRIPTION CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_DESCRIPTION,
  -999 BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
  -999 BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
  -999 BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
  SOFIFST.ACTION_CODE
 FROM 
   $$STGDB.ST_OM_FND_ID_FLEX_STRUC_TL SOFIFST
 WHERE  
    SOFIFST.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
    and LANGUAGE_CODE = 'US'
 and ( ID_FLEX_NUM ) not in 
    ( select ID_FLEX_NUM from  $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_STRUC_TL SMFIFST
         where  SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
      AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME IN ('US','BE')
      and SMFIFST.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'US'
    )

SELECT 
	SMFIFST.BATCH_ID, 
	SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID,
	SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_CODE, 
	SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM, 
	SMFIFST.LANGUAGE_CODE, 
	SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME, 
	SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME, 
	SMFIFST.DESCRIPTION, 
	SMFIFS_PROJ.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID PROJ_FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID,
	SMFIFS_ACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID ACCT_FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID,
	SMFIFS_SUBACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID SUBACCT_FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID,
	SMFIFST.CREATE_DATETIME, 
	SMFIFST.ACTION_CODE,
	'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
	 $$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_STRUC_TL SMFIFST
	,$$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_PROJ
	,$$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_SUBACCT
	,$$STGDB.ST_MF_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_ACCT
WHERE   SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
	AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME IN ('US','BE')
	AND SMFIFST.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'US'
	AND NOT (SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM=101 AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME='BE')
	AND SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_ID
	AND SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_ID
	AND SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_ID
	AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = SMFIFS_PROJ.ID_FLEX_NUM
	AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = SMFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM
	AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = SMFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM
	AND SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT6'
	AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = SMFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT5'
    AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = SMFIFS_SUBACCT.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT4'
	AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND 	(
			NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_PROJ_LOCALITY_TV NFPLTV WHERE 
			SMFIFS_PROJ.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT )
		OR 
			NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFALTV WHERE 
			SMFIFS_ACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFALTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT )
		OR 
			NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_SUBACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFSLTV WHERE 
			SMFIFS_SUBACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT )
		)

SELECT 
	SCFIFST.BATCH_ID, 
	SCFIFST.APPLICATION_ID,
	SCFIFST.ID_FLEX_CODE, 
	SCFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM, 
	SCFIFST.LANGUAGE_CODE, 
	SCFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME, 
	SCFIFST.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME, 
	SCFIFST.DESCRIPTION, 
	SCFIFS_PROJ.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID PROJ_FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID,
	SCFIFS_ACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID ACCT_FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID,
	SCFIFS_SUBACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID SUBACCT_FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID,
	SCFIFST.CREATE_DATETIME, 
	SCFIFST.ACTION_CODE,
	'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
	 $$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_STRUC_TL SCFIFST
	,$$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SCFIFS_PROJ
	,$$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SCFIFS_SUBACCT
	,$$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SCFIFS_ACCT
WHERE   SCFIFST.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
	AND SCFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
	AND SCFIFST.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'US'
	AND NOT (SCFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM=101 AND SCFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
	AND SCFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = SCFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_ID
	AND SCFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = SCFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_ID
	AND SCFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = SCFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_ID
	AND SCFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = SCFIFS_PROJ.ID_FLEX_NUM
	AND SCFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = SCFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM
	AND SCFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = SCFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM
	AND SCFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT6'
	AND SCFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = SCFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND SCFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT5'
    AND SCFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = SCFIFS_SUBACCT.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND SCFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT4'
	AND SCFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = SCFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND 	(
			NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_PROJ_LOCALITY_TV NFPLTV WHERE 
			SCFIFS_PROJ.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT )
		OR 
			NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFALTV WHERE 
			SCFIFS_ACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFALTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT )
		OR 
			NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_SUBACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFSLTV WHERE 
			SCFIFS_SUBACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT )
		)

SELECT 
CFN.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
CFN.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_NAME,
CFN.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_DESCRIPTION,
CFN.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
CFN.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
CFN.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
CFN.ACTION_CODE
FROM (
 SELECT 
 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_NAME,
 SMFIFST.DESCRIPTION CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_DESCRIPTION,
 COALESCE(PROJ_LOC.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
 COALESCE(SUBAC_LOC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
 COALESCE(AC_LOC.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
 SMFIFST.ACTION_CODE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_STRUC_TL SMFIFST
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFALTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_ACCT
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFALTV
      ON SMFIFS_ACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFALTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFALTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT4'
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG') AC_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = AC_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = AC_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = AC_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_SUBACCT
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_SUBACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFSLTV
      ON SMFIFS_SUBACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFSLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT5'
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#' 
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG') SUBAC_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = SUBAC_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = SUBAC_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = SUBAC_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_ID,
       SMFIFS_PROJ.ID_FLEX_NUM,
       SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
       SMFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME,
       NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
       FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_PROJ
       INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_PROJ_LOCALITY_TV NFPLTV
       ON SMFIFS_PROJ.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
       AND NFPLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
       AND SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT6'
       AND SMFIFS_PROJ.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
       AND SMFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG') PROJ_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = PROJ_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = PROJ_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = PROJ_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 WHERE SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
 AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
 AND SMFIFST.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'US'
 UNION ALL
 SELECT 
 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT,
 SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_NAME,
 SMFIFST.DESCRIPTION CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_DESCRIPTION,
 COALESCE(PROJ_LOC.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
 COALESCE(SUBAC_LOC.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
 COALESCE(AC_LOC.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,-999) BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
 SMFIFST.ACTION_CODE
 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_STRUC_TL SMFIFST
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFALTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_ACCT
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFALTV
      ON SMFIFS_ACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFALTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFALTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT4'
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
      AND SMFIFS_ACCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG' ) AC_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = AC_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = AC_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = AC_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_SUBACCT.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_SUBACCT
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_SUBACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFSLTV
      ON SMFIFS_SUBACCT.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFSLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT5'
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
      AND SMFIFS_SUBACCT.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG') SUBAC_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = SUBAC_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = SUBAC_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = SUBAC_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_ID,
      SMFIFS_PROJ.ID_FLEX_NUM,
      SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME,
      SMFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME,
      NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
      FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_FND_ID_FLEX_SEGMENTS SMFIFS_PROJ
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_PROJ_LOCALITY_TV NFPLTV
      ON SMFIFS_PROJ.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFPLTV.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
      AND NFPLTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
      AND SMFIFS_PROJ.APPLICATION_COLUMN_NAME = 'SEGMENT6'
      AND SMFIFS_PROJ.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
      AND SMFIFS_PROJ.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG' ) PROJ_LOC
 ON SMFIFST.APPLICATION_ID = PROJ_LOC.APPLICATION_ID
  AND SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_NUM = PROJ_LOC.ID_FLEX_NUM
  AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = PROJ_LOC.GLOBAL_NAME
 WHERE SMFIFST.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
 AND SMFIFST.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
 AND SMFIFST.LANGUAGE_CODE = 'US' ) CFN
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS WCOA
 WHERE CFN.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT = WCOA.BK_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID_INT)
